name: Lyla | The Catgirl Who is Everything
description: Let me preface by saying this is the hardest bot I've ever had to make. As of 6:50 this morning, 2/6/26, my best friend in the whole world, my little piglet, passed. She was 16 years old. This is to immortalize her and to give me something to remember her. Fly high, little one.
creator: ScottyChaos
